field_definitions.convo_id: string. Must be empty in simple. In conversation mode: empty means create new process convo, non-empty means reuse existing convo. In user_conversation mode it resolves to the active session_id.
field_definitions.user_id: string. Must be empty in simple and conversation. Required in user_conversation and should use session_id format '{super_user}_s{N}'.
field_definitions.request_id: string, unique identifier for this request
field_definitions.trace_id: string, required. Unique ID for this specific network request turn; used for cancellation tracking by the Scheduler.
field_definitions.tree_id: string, required. User conversations MUST originate from TREE_HANDLER.
field_definitions.source_pid: int, process sending this request (could be child process in EXEC scenario)
field_definitions.messages: array of {role, content} message objects. For simple mode, this is standard abstraction. For conversation mode, these are appended to history.
field_definitions.tool_result: string (optional), alias for a complete 'tool' role message in conversation mode.
field_definitions.sampling_params: object with temp, top_p, max_tokens (may be overridden from config)
